headline: SLB (SLB): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: What a time it’s been for SLB. In the past six months alone, the company’s stock price has increased by a massive 53.6%, reaching $55.78 per share. This performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
